---
title: "Function testing v3"
format: html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tidygraph)
library(leaflet)

source("connectivity_function_v3.R")
```

```{r}
#| label: run-connectivity-v3
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Expects `out$net_with_dams` already in memory
if (!exists("out") || is.null(out$net_with_dams)) {
  stop("Missing `out$net_with_dams` in environment.", call. = FALSE)
}

# Edit these thresholds (km)
threshold_downstream_km <- Inf
threshold_upstream_km <- Inf
threshold_cascade_km <- Inf

conn_v3 <- connectivity_from_network(
  net_with_dams = out$net_with_dams,
  threshold_downstream_km = threshold_downstream_km,
  threshold_upstream_km = threshold_upstream_km,
  threshold_cascade_km = threshold_cascade_km
)

reach_df <- conn_v3$reach_df
debug <- conn_v3$debug
```

```{r}
#| label: prep-map-data
#| message: false
#| warning: false

edges_map <- out$net_with_dams %>%
  tidygraph::activate("edges") %>%
  sf::st_as_sf() %>%
  st_transform(4326)

nodes_map <- out$net_with_dams %>%
  tidygraph::activate("nodes") %>%
  sf::st_as_sf() %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(dam_id)) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(reach_df, by = "dam_id") %>%
  st_transform(4326)

current_nodes <- nodes_map %>% dplyr::filter(is_current_dam %in% TRUE)
future_nodes <- nodes_map %>% dplyr::filter(is_current_dam %in% FALSE)

future_nodes <- future_nodes %>%
  dplyr::mutate(category_map = connectivity_category)

category_levels <- c("FFR", "upstream", "downstream", "cascade_classic", "cascade1", "cascade2", "cascade3+")
category_colors <- c(
  "FFR" = "#ff5615",
  "upstream" = "#ffa946",
  "downstream" = "#eada31",
  "cascade_classic" = "#015A00",
  "cascade1" = "#63bd5d",
  "cascade2" = "#a0fca0",
  "cascade3+" = "#c0f7c0"
)

# Discrete palette for river trunks (bb_id).
trunk_pal <- leaflet::colorFactor(
  palette = "Set3",
  domain = sort(unique(as.character(edges_map$bb_id))),
  na.color = "#8f8f8f"
)


m <- leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addPolylines(
    data = edges_map,
       color = ~trunk_pal(as.character(bb_id)), # Adjust network line sizes
    weight = 2.6,
    opacity = 0.65,
    group = "River edges",
    popup = ~paste0("bb_id: ", bb_id)
  ) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = current_nodes,
    radius = 4,
    stroke = FALSE, # Adjust current dams
    color = "#8f8f8f",
    fillColor = "#8f8f8f",
    fillOpacity = 0.9,
    group = "Current dams",
    popup = ~paste0("Current dam<br>dam_id: ", dam_id, "<br>bb_id: ", bb_id)
  )

for (cat_name in category_levels) {
  cat_data <- future_nodes %>% dplyr::filter(category_map == cat_name)
  if (nrow(cat_data) > 0) {
    m <- m %>%
      addCircleMarkers(
        data = cat_data,
        radius = 5, # Adjust future dams
        stroke = FALSE,
        color = category_colors[[cat_name]],
        fillColor = category_colors[[cat_name]],
        fillOpacity = 0.9,
        group = paste0("Future: ", cat_name),
        popup = ~paste0(
          "Future dam<br>dam_id: ", dam_id,
          "<br>category: ", category_map,
          "<br>cascade_level: ", cascade_level,
          "<br>up_dam: ", dam_id_up,
          "<br>up_km: ", round(min_distance_upstream_km, 2),
          "<br>up_hops: ", upstream_hops,
          "<br>down_dam: ", dam_id_down,
          "<br>down_km: ", round(min_distance_downstream_km, 2),
          "<br>down_hops: ", downstream_hops
        )
      )
  }
}

m %>%
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = c(
      "River edges",
      "Current dams",
      paste0("Future: ", category_levels)
    ),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors = unname(category_colors),
    labels = names(category_colors),
    title = "Future connectivity category",
    opacity = 1
  ) %>%
  addScaleBar(position = "bottomleft")
```
